definitions.name: early_readmits
definitions.business_description: Conditional count of records where flagged.readmit_category equals 'Early'

definitions.name: late_readmits
definitions.business_description: Conditional count of records where flagged.readmit_category equals 'Late'

definitions.name: filter:where:PAT_ENC_HSP.HOSP_DISCH_TIME
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Hospital discharge date and time is not null

definitions.name: filter:where:PAT_ENC_HSP.ADT_PAT_CLASS_C
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Patient class (1=Inpatient, 2=Outpatient, 3=Emergency, 4=Observation) is Inpatient

definitions.name: filter:where:PAT_ENC_HSP.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Hospital admission date and time is at least '2025-01-01'

definitions.name: filter:having:unknown
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where COUNT(*) is at least 50

definitions.name: los_days
definitions.business_description: The number of days between Hospital admission date and time and Hospital discharge date and time
conditions: Hospital discharge date and time is not null
Hospital admission date and time is at least '2025-01-01'

definitions.name: encounter_seq
definitions.business_description: Row ranking (used for deduplication or ordering)
conditions: Hospital discharge date and time is not null
Hospital admission date and time is at least '2025-01-01'
definitions.technical_expression: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pat_enc_hsp.pat_id ORDER BY pat_enc_hsp.hosp_admsn_time)

definitions.name: filter:where:PAT_ENC_HSP.HOSP_DISCH_TIME
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Hospital discharge date and time is not null

definitions.name: filter:where:PAT_ENC_HSP.ADT_PAT_CLASS_C
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Patient class (1=Inpatient, 2=Outpatient, 3=Emergency, 4=Observation) is Inpatient

definitions.name: filter:where:PAT_ENC_HSP.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Hospital admission date and time is at least '2025-01-01'

definitions.name: next_admit_time
definitions.business_description: Previous/next value comparison using index_encounters.PAT_ID, index_encounters.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME, index_encounters.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME
definitions.technical_expression: LEAD(index_encounters.hosp_admsn_time) OVER (PARTITION BY index_encounters.pat_id ORDER BY index_encounters.hosp_admsn_time)

definitions.name: days_to_readmit
definitions.business_description: Previous/next value comparison using DAY, index_encounters.HOSP_DISCH_TIME, index_encounters.PAT_ID, index_encounters.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME, index_encounters.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME
definitions.technical_expression: DATEDIFF(day, index_encounters.hosp_disch_time, LEAD(index_encounters.hosp_admsn_time) OVER (PARTITION BY index_encounters.pat_id ORDER BY index_encounters.hosp_admsn_time))

definitions.name: is_30day_readmit
definitions.business_description:
Classified as:
  - 1 when with_readmit.days_to_readmit is at most 30
  - 0 otherwise
definitions.technical_expression: CASE WHEN with_readmit.days_to_readmit <= 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

definitions.name: readmit_category
definitions.business_description:
Classified as:
  - 'Early' when with_readmit.days_to_readmit is at most 7
  - 'Late' when with_readmit.days_to_readmit is between 8 and 30
  - 'None' otherwise
definitions.technical_expression: CASE WHEN with_readmit.days_to_readmit <= 7 THEN 'Early' WHEN with_readmit.days_to_readmit BETWEEN 8 AND 30 THEN 'Late' ELSE 'None' END
